headline: Motorola Solutions to Issue Second-Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on August 5
summary: CHICAGO, July 22, 2026--Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: MSI) will issue its second-quarter 2026 earnings results after the close of the market on Wednesday, August 5.

headline: Can Motorola (MSI) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
summary: Motorola (MSI) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
